untranslatable_reason: The pattern requires precise multi-candle sequence analysis: (1) identification of a 4-candle pattern with specific sequencing; (2) measurement of body sizes and shadow properties across multiple bars; (3) detection of gap-down with body overlap; (4) detection of complete engulfment including shadows. These requirements exceed the capabilities of single-bar indicators and simple cross-comparisons. The allowed indicators cannot express: candle comparison across 4 bars with shadow engulfment logic, relative body sizing sequences, or gap detection with body penetration. Pattern recognition of this complexity requires specialized candlestick pattern detection logic not present in the indicator set.
translation_notes: This 4-candle pattern (Concealing Baby Swallow) fundamentally requires: bar[i] and bar[i+1] as marubozu (no shadows, long black bodies), bar[i+2] with upper shadow that gaps below bar[i+1] but trades into its body, bar[i+3] completely engulfing bar[i+2] including shadows. The structured indicators provided cannot model relative candle relationships, shadow comparisons across multiple bars, or gap-with-overlap logic. A custom pattern detector is needed.
